field_title: Carolina Meats Inc. Recalls Ground Beef Products Due to Possible E. coli O157:H7 Contamination
field_product_items: 10-lb. chubs of "CAROLINA MEATS GROUND BEEF 81/19" with lot code 26166, UPC 0 41512 33874 9
field_summary: WASHINGTON, June 15, 2026 – Carolina Meats Inc., a Charlotte, N.C. establishment, is recalling approximately 42,000 pounds of raw ground beef products that may be contaminated with E. coli O157:H7. Anyone concerned about an illness should contact a healthcare provider. Young children, older adults, and people with weakened immune systems are most at risk.

field_title: Sunrise Kitchens LLC Recalls Chicken Wrap Products Due to Misbranding and Undeclared Allergens
field_product_items: 9.5-oz. plastic trays of "SUNRISE SOUTHWEST CHICKEN WRAP" with use-by dates 04/22/2026 through 04/29/2026
field_summary: Sunrise Kitchens LLC is recalling chicken wrap products due to misbranding and an undeclared allergen. The product contains sesame, a known allergen, which is not declared on the product label.

field_title: FSIS Issues Public Health Alert for Frozen Beef Tamale Products Due to Possible Foreign Matter Contamination
field_product_items: 24-oz. boxes of "MESA VERDE BEEF TAMALES" with lot 26098
field_summary: FSIS is issuing a public health alert for frozen beef tamale products that may be contaminated with small pieces of plastic. The products were shipped to distributors in Texas and New Mexico. FSIS is not requesting a recall at this time.
